bounded_scope: Add reset-required password completion for the hardened username/password pilot auth path and expose it in the canonical workspace without direct Figma work.
changes: The reset route verifies current password, enforces existing password policy, rejects unchanged replacements, updates password hash/salt, increments password_version, clears reset state, revokes stale sessions, creates a fresh session, and writes password_reset_completed audit events.
Updated workspace.js to render a reset completion panel with data-auth-action="complete-reset" when login or session state returns password_reset_required.
Updated workspace.css for the reset panel.
Expanded auth integration coverage and workspace source/browser-smoke markers.
Regenerated the production route inventory to include /api/auth/complete-reset.
